name: Apple Inc.
summary: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones (iPhone), personal computers (Mac), tablets (iPad), wearables (Apple Watch, AirPods, Apple Vision Pro), and accessories. The company also offers a broad range of services including the App Store, Apple Music, Apple TV+, Apple Arcade, Apple Fitness+, Apple News+, Apple Pay, Apple Card, AppleCare, iCloud, and advertising platforms. Products are sold through retail stores, online channels, and indirect partners like cellular carriers.
